goal: Harden runtime behavior by fixing the highest-priority P1 and P2 findings already identified in the audit and review artifacts.
successCriteria: Tracked P1 and P2 runtime bugs are fixed with focused regression tests.
Fixes stay bounded to hardening work and do not reopen broad runtime feature expansion.
Deferred audit items remain explicit for later packages instead of leaking into opportunistic fixes.
explicitlyOutOfScope: New runtime product surfaces unrelated to audited bugs.
Maturity promotion without a separate promotion decision artifact.
